ideation: This animation sequence depicts a health worker in a caring and professional manner.  It starts with arms relaxed at the sides, then moves to a gesture of offering help, and finally returns to a neutral pose.  The movement should be smooth and deliberate, reflecting a calm, reassuring demeanor.  The lack of elbows in the robot arm design will be addressed by focusing on shoulder movements to convey the intended actions.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, a calm professional presence
both arms extend forward, offering gentle assistance
arms lower slightly, a reassuring, helpful stance
